import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import sympy as sp
{% endraw %} {% raw %} 
theta = np.arange(0,360,1)
rad_conv = np.pi/180
Laa = np.sin(2*theta*rad_conv)
Lbb = np.sin(2*theta*rad_conv)
Lcc = np.sin(2*theta*rad_conv)
{% endraw %}
